basics.name: Hassan Algasid
basics.label: AI Solutions / Forward Deployed Operator — Vertical AI (PropTech, FinTech, Career-Tech)
basics.summary: AI-native engineer building vertical-AI products end-to-end. Founder of HassTech LLC — seven production apps shipped across PropTech, FinTech, and HR/career-tech, all on Cloudflare's edge. Built a 10-provider LLM proxy with FinOps + observability (HT Meter), MCP servers, an ATS-aware retrieval system (TF-IDF + react-pdf), and a self-hostable AI Collaboration Operating Room. Methodology: scope, direct AI agents, review every diff, ship. Forward-deployed approach: scoped problem → working software in days, not quarters.

work.name: HassTech LLC
work.summary: Solo-founder building vertical-AI products on Cloudflare's edge. AI-native, forward-deployed engineer: scope the product, direct AI agents through implementation, review every diff, ship and iterate end-to-end. Output is the bar — seven production apps live.
highlights: Shipped 7 production products across PropTech, FinTech, and HR/career-tech in under 18 months — all on free-tier infrastructure (Cloudflare Pages, Workers, D1, KV, Browser Rendering).

Built a local-first FinOps + observability proxy (HT Meter) covering 10 LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq, Mistral, Cohere, etc.) with token accounting, rate-limit visibility, and cost forecasting; companion local-first multi-model LLM workbench (LLM Studio) for offline experimentation.

Built ATS-aware resume tooling (HT Career + HT Resume) using TF-IDF keyword matching against job descriptions and react-pdf programmatic exports, plus a JSON-Resume → multi-format auto-publish pipeline.

Run an agent-first development workflow with Claude Code, Cursor, and custom MCP servers (KeePassXC bridge); designed a self-hostable AI Collaboration Operating Room control plane unifying humans + agents + audit trails.
Authored an official PHP SDK for HTPdf published on Packagist (PSR-18, typed client, retries, streaming) — broadening adoption across LAMP stacks.
Built reusable infrastructure (auth, basic-auth gating, Turnstile-validated contact pipeline, brand kit) that any new HassTech product inherits on day one.

education.institution: Self-taught engineer. Production portfolio at github.com/HassTech-LLC.

projects.name: HT Calc
projects.description: Mortgage and real-estate calculator suite — interactive scenarios, amortization, affordability, and investor cash-flow modeling.
highlights: Original HassTech product. Edge-rendered, no backend dependency — works fully offline after first load.
Drives the brand-kit and auth conventions reused across the rest of the suite.

projects.name: HassTech Suite Hub
projects.description: Marketing and discovery hub for the HassTech product suite at hasstechapi.com.
highlights: Astro static site on Cloudflare Pages with a Cloudflare Worker contact endpoint that validates Turnstile and files GitHub issues for inbound leads.
Centralized brand kit, design tokens, and meta layer reused across every HassTech product.

projects.name: HTPdf / HTPrint API
projects.description: High-throughput HTML→PDF API at the edge with a brand-kit system for white-label, multi-tenant PDF output.
highlights: Cloudflare Workers + Browser Rendering for sub-second PDF synthesis at the edge.
Brand kit layer turns one input into branded PDFs for any tenant.
Official PHP SDK published on Packagist (PSR-18, typed client, retries, streaming).

projects.name: NeuronScope
projects.description: Mechanistic-interpretability suite for probing transformer internals and agent decision surfaces (research-adjacent).
highlights: Live 3D weight visualization via React + Three.js / R3F.
Three-stage LLM Council (propose / critique / synthesize) for layered model interpretation.

projects.name: HT Meter
projects.description: Local-first AI usage proxy and dashboard. Meters spend, requests, and tokens across providers without sending data off-machine.
highlights: Runs on localhost:8080. CLI: `ht-meter start`. SQLite-backed.
Phase 0 shipped to internal use; Phase 1 adds shared team views over Cloudflare Tunnel.

projects.name: HT Career
projects.description: Free AI resume inspector and career concierge at career.hasstechapi.com.
highlights: D1 + Groq stack — sub-second resume scoring and rewrite suggestions.
Private-beta basic-auth for early users.

projects.name: HT Folio
projects.description: Auto-generated developer portfolio at ht-folio.pages.dev — drop a GitHub username, get a deployable portfolio site.
highlights: Astro + Cloudflare Pages + KV; safely surfaces private-repo work via a metadata layer with no source disclosure.
Generated portfolios pull live README, language stats, and contribution graphs from the GitHub API.

skills.name: Agents & MCP
keywords: Claude Code SDK / skills / hooks / sub-agents
